traditionalUsesEn: Traditional Native American use; modern European phytotherapy for menopausal symptoms (products standardized).
traditionalUsesDe: Traditionelle indigene Nutzung; moderne europäische Phytotherapie bei Wechseljahresbeschwerden.
activeCompounds: Triterpene glycosides, phenolic acids; exact actives debated
preparation: Dried root extracts and tablets under product guidance.
cautions: Rare liver issues reported—stop if jaundice. Not for pregnancy. Professional advice for menopause care.
